title: Fizz Buzz
description: Given a positive integer x, return a list of strings for each number/integer from 1 to x (x included). For multiples of 3 output 'Fizz', for multiples of 5 output 'Buzz' and for multiples of both 3 and 5 output 'FizzBuzz'; for all other numbers output the number itself as a string. For instance: Given x=6, Output=['1', '2', 'Fizz', '4', 'Buzz', '6']
outputFormat: List of strings whereby the strings are either the numbers itself (as strings), 'Fizz', 'Buzz' or 'FizzBuzz'

testCases.expectedOutput: [1, 2, Fizz, 4, Buzz, Fizz, 7, 8, Fizz, Buzz, 11, Fizz, 13, 14, FizzBuzz]
